name: Olive Garden Toscana Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Potatoes; halve lengthwise and cut into slices
2 cups Cavolo Nero or kale; halve and slice 1/16 inch strips
1 1/2 cups Spicy sausage links, halved and sliced 1/2 inch
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the sausage link on a sheet pan and bake in a 300°F oven for 15-20 minutes or until cooked through.
2. Add onions and pancetta to a 3-4 quart saucepan and cook onions over medium heat until they are almost clear, about 5 minutes.
3. Add garlic and cook for an additional minute.
4. Stir in the chicken broth, water, and potatoes. Bring to a simmer and cook for 15 minutes.
5. Add the remaining ingredients (kale and sausage) and simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
6. Serve hot.
